name: Fisherman
text: Hey. You're staying with old Ana, right?

name: Fisherman
text: My grandad used to say she knew this village better than anyone alive.

name: Fisherman
text: Said she built half of it with her own hands.

name: Fisherman
text: He never lied about things like that.

name: You
text: Do you have any fish? I think she'd like that.

name: Fisherman
text: Tell her Perica's grandson says hello.

name: Fisherman
text: Stay and talk a while? I don't get many visitors. [Press T to talk and stay, Enter to leave]
